title: DRILL 3.10 Iterative Solution to a Difference Equation
summary: This page continues an example of solving a recursive difference equation iteratively from given initial conditions and a causal input, including computed values y[0], y[1], and y[2]. It also provides MATLAB code to verify the recursion and ends with Drill 3.10, which asks for the first three terms of another iterative solution and gives the answer.
